creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 152174
fix build on armv6

Hi,

The ports needs the same patches found in xorg-server to build properly on armv6

build failure log:
http://chips.ysv.freebsd.org/data/11armv6-11armv6/2015-01-
25_16h41m39s/logs/errors/xorg-vfbserver-1.14.7,1.log

build log with the attached patch:
